message:
fix: resolve import path, quality report logic, and cleanup stubs

mcp_helpers.rs:
- Fix import path from super:: to super::mcp_types:: for
  CapabilityResolution, IpcPaneState, McpEnvelope, McpReservationInfo,
  now_ms — aligns with the module structure after Wave 4A extraction

runtime_compat.rs:
- Remove the non-asupersync stub for current_runtime_handle() that
  returned Option<()> — callers requiring a handle should use the
  real asupersync feature gate
- Clarify doc comment on install_runtime_handle to mention inherited-
  handle helper paths

tantivy_quality.rs:
- Fix QualityReport.passed count: was counting entries where both
  passed AND latency_ok were true, now correctly counts only assertion
  passes (latency violations are tracked separately)
- Fix all_passed: was comparing passed == total_queries (which
  double-counted latency), now uses .all() checking passed &&
  latency_ok && no error
- Add test assertions for passed=1, failed=0 in the latency violation
  scenario to pin the corrected semantics

mux_client.rs:
- Improve error message in inherited_subscription_runtime_handle()
- Update doc comment on subscribe_pane_output_with_inherited_cx to
  reflect scoped spawning rather than ambient

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
